subject: Subscribe, Gift, or Travel with The Times. Special Offers Inside!
body:
Great Ways to Save and Travel with The Times.

-----------------------------------------------------------------

View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTdzMnB81HXJB86F2rAAwENcq9/viwb?t_params=CAMPAIGN_CODE%3D46JJL%26EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

GREAT WAYS TO SAVE AND TRAVEL WITH THE TIMES.
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTdzMnB81HXJB86F2rAAwENcq9/sub01

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Try a Digital Subscription -- just $5 for your first 12 weeks.

Stay informed and inspired with unlimited digital access to 
NYTimes.com and NYTimes apps. Get immersive storytelling and 
innovative multimedia coverage of the topics that interest you 
most so that you're fully informed with the world's finest 
journalism.

Plus, enjoy news summaries and updates with the new NYT Now 
iPhone(R) app, a $104 yearly value, included free with 
your subscription. 

GET DIGITAL:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTdzMnB81HXJB86F2rAAwENcq9/sub02

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Get 30% off a Times Gift Subscription for Dad

This Father's Day give the gift that informs and inspires daily. 
Gift subscriptions include full access to NYTimes.com and your 
choice of smartphone or tablet apps or both. Either way, you'll
save 30% on a 12- or 26-week gift subscription for Dad. 

GIVE A GIFT:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTdzMnB81HXJB86F2rAAwENcq9/gift01

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Travel with The New York Times. 

On every tour you'll be joined by an expert with special 
insights related to your trip - from an opera director or a 
historian to former diplomats and politicians. 

Select from upcoming Times Journeys focused on:

Food & Wine: Picnic among the vines in Provence.

Politics: Get a deeper understanding of the political situation 
in Russia through a discussion with a Times journalist.

Culture: Walk through Hong Kong with The New York Times's 
bureau chief.

LEARN MORE:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTdzMnB81HXJB86F2rAAwENcq9/brandlearn

or PayPal account will be charged in advance of each four-week 
billing period unless canceled. If the subscription is 
canceled, refunds and termination of access will follow 
the Terms of Sale policy. Prices are in U.S. dollars and 
are subject to change. Other restrictions and taxes may apply.

request a copy to be sent to you. Abercrombie & Kent 
CST# 2007274-20, Mountain Travel CST# 2014882-10,

body_html:
Great Ways to Save and Travel with The Times.
View in browser

Try a Digital Subscription —
just $5 for your first 12 weeks.

Stay informed and inspired with unlimited digital access to NYTimes.com and NYTimes apps. Get immersive storytelling and innovative multimedia coverage of the topics that interest you most so that you’re fully informed with the world’s finest journalism.

Plus, enjoy news summaries and updates with the new NYT Now iPhone® app, a $104 yearly value, included free with your subscription.


Get 30% off a Times Gift Subscription
for Dad

This Father’s Day give the gift that informs and inspires daily. Gift subscriptions include full access to NYTimes.com and your choice of smartphone or tablet apps or both. Either way, you’ll save 30% on a 12- or 26-week gift subscription for Dad.


Travel with The New York Times.

On every tour you’ll be joined by an expert with special insights related to your trip — from an opera director or a historian to former diplomats and politicians.

Select from upcoming Times Journeys
focused on: Food & Wine: Picnic among the vines in Provence. Politics: Get a deeper understanding of the political situation in Russia through a discussion with a Times journalist. Culture: Walk through Hong Kong with The New York Times’s bureau chief.

NYTimes.com + Smartphone Apps, NYTimes.com + Tablet Apps and All Digital Access subscriptions do not include e-reader editions, Times Premier content or digital versions of The New York Times Crossword. You will be billed $5 for the first 12 weeks up front which is nonrefundable. After the first 12 weeks, all subscriptions will automatically renew and your credit card or PayPal account will be charged in advance of each four-week billing period unless canceled. If the subscription is canceled, refunds and termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. Other restrictions and taxes may apply.
